data.title: GitLab Wins a 2026 Google Cloud Technology Partner of the Year Award for DevSecOps
data.description: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. was awarded the 2026 Google Cloud Technology Partner of the Year in the Application Development - DevSecOps category. This marks the sixth year in a row that GitLab has received recognition for its platform. The collaboration between GitLab and Google Cloud has been amplified to assist in handling the rapid adoption of AI agents by development teams, a process that often outpaces governance. This joint effort aims to bridge this gap and enable teams to maximize their efficiency.

data.title: Nearly Half of Organizations are Trapped in Hybrid Cloud Catch-22 as Complex Database Migrations Reach a Standstill
data.description: In Cambridge, England, database software company Redgate released a report titled The Cloud Migration Divide, which is an extension of its 2026 State of the Database Landscape survey involving 2,150 IT professionals worldwide. The report, focusing on Amazon Web Services (AWS), highlights that 43% of organizations globally have adopted hybrid cloud environments as their long-term operational solution. According to the findings, organizations are efficiently shifting simple workloads to the cloud, but are hesitant to migrate complex and high-risk databases, leaving them in a hybrid state.

data.title: MiQ Report Studying 53 Million Households Shows the Traditional Path to Purchase is Dead
data.description: A recent study by a prominent programmatic media company, MiQ, reveals that the conventional marketing funnel, a century-old model, is no longer accurate in representing consumer behavior. The research, based on an analysis of 53 million households globally, indicates that 87% of consumers transition between digital activities every hour. Interestingly, 42% of consumers feel that their journey to making a purchase is entirely random, highlighting the unpredictable nature of their behavior. These findings suggest a fundamental shift in consumer behavior patterns, challenging traditional marketing strategies.

data.title: 55ip Expands Investment Platform With T. Rowe Price Custom Models
data.description: At Boston, 55ip, a tax-efficient investment technology platform owned by J.P. Morgan, revealed its expansion of the investment platform by partnering with T. Rowe Price. T. Rowe Price, a prominent company in investment management and retirement solutions, will collaborate to offer customized models to advisors. Through this partnership, advisors can create and execute tailored model portfolios utilizing T. Rowe Price strategies, supported by 55ip’s ActiveTax Technology℠. This collaboration aims to enhance advisory services and provide personalized investment solutions to clients.
On April 23, Vladimir Putin will hold a meeting with members of the Government via video conference

data.title: Arm & Hammer™ Laundry Makes History at Stagecoach as First-Ever Presenting Sponsor of the Half-Pint Hootenanny
data.description: In Ewing, New Jersey, at Stagecoach, the world's biggest country music festival, messiness is not just accepted but embraced as a cherished part of the experience. ARM & HAMMER™ Laundry has taken a significant step this year by becoming the inaugural Presenting Sponsor of the Half-Pint Hootenanny, a popular family area at the festival. Scheduled from April 24 to 26, families can engage in the festival's festivities, such as dancing and hands-on activities, without worrying about the clean-up, courtesy of ARM & HAMMER™ Laundry, the leading Liquid Laundry Detergent Brand.

data.title: Toro Corp. Declares Special Dividend of $0.90 Per Share
data.description: In Limassol, Cyprus on April 22, 2026, Toro Corp. (NASDAQ: TORO), a leading global energy transportation provider, revealed that its board of directors has approved a special dividend of $0.90 per common share. Shareholders of record as of May 4, 2026, will be eligible to receive the dividend. The payment date for this one-time dividend is set for June 5, 2026.
GE Vernova Stock Hits 52-Week High - Here's Why

data.title: Rhône Valley Vineyards Launches Dynamic 2026 Integrated Communications Program in the US
data.description: The renowned wine-producing region has revealed an innovative plan to enhance connections with American customers. Inter Rhône, the group representing Rhône Valley Vineyards AOCs, disclosed the kickoff of its comprehensive 2026 initiative in New York on April 22, 2026.

data.title: Russian lawmakers pass bill regulating crypto through licensed intermediaries, key rules to take effect in July 2026 and 2027.
data.description: Legislators in Russia have approved the initial reading of a bill that will oversee the regulation of cryptocurrencies with the involvement of licensed intermediaries. The legislation outlines important guidelines that are scheduled to come into force in July of both 2026 and 2027.

data.title: Sterling Schedules 2026 First Quarter Release and Conference Call
data.description: Sterling Infrastructure, Inc. (NasdaqGS: STRL), based in The Woodlands, Texas, is set to release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 4, 2026, after the closing of the stock market. The Company announced its upcoming plans, providing stakeholders and investors with an insight into its performance for the quarter.
First Community Corporation Announces First Quarter Results and Cash Dividend

data.title: Accelerating Momentum in Clinical Use and Customer Growth for Atraverse Medical's HOTWIRE™ Transseptal Access System
data.description: New data has confirmed the safety and effectiveness of Atraverse Medical's left-heart access technology, with a significant reduction in radiofrequency delivery. The company will be presenting its system at HRS 2026, Booth 2410 in San Diego. This announcement comes as the company continues to showcase consistent performance across various workflows. These findings highlight the positive impact of the technology, further solidifying Atraverse Medical's position as a leader in the field.

data.title: DR.G EXPANDS INTO THE U.S. WITH NEW INNOVATIVE SKINCARE LAUNCHES, BRINGING K-BEAUTY DERMATOLOGICAL EXPERTISE TO A GLOBAL STAGE
data.description: A top skincare company from South Korea has launched new hydration, brightening, and at-home peeling products for consumers in the United States. Dr.G, the No.1 dermocosmetic brand in Korea, revealed this move in New York on April 22, 2026. The brand is introducing advanced skincare solutions to U.S. markets, aiming to offer innovative products and expand its reach.

data.title: GCI to Acquire Quintillion, Strengthening Alaska's Fiber Infrastructure
data.description: GCI Holdings, LLC, a subsidiary of GCI Liberty, Inc., and Grain Management, LLC recently revealed their collaboration to enhance reliability, resiliency, and performance through integrated networks. The announcement was made on April 22, 2026, in Anchorage, Alaska. GCI Liberty, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq as GLIBA and GLIBK. This partnership signifies a significant step towards improving connectivity and overall network functioning.

data.title: OFG Bancorp Analysts Raise Their Forecasts Following Upbeat Q1 Results
data.description: OFG Bancorp (NYSE: OFG) announced strong first-quarter earnings, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported earnings of $1.26 per share, exceeding the estimated $1.02 per share. Quarterly sales amounted to $185.800 million, surpassing the estimated $166.544 million. CEO José Rafael Fernández attributed the positive results to business momentum, strategic execution, balance sheet management, and core deposit strength. The company also highlighted ongoing loan growth, solid credit performance, and consistent franchise execution. Additionally, OFG repurchased $44.5 million worth of shares during the quarter. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: RapidScale Enables Streamlined Agentic AI Operations with Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise
data.description: A recently launched three-tiered solution is aiding companies in swiftly transitioning from testing to implementing scalable and secure AI applications. The initiative was introduced by RapidScale, a prominent enterprise services provider under Cox Business, headquartered in Raleigh, North Carolina. This offering is intended to facilitate the deployment of AI technologies effectively.

data.title: StandardAero to Provide Repair and Overhaul Support on MT7 Engine Powering U.S. Navy Ship to Shore Connector Hovercraft
data.description: StandardAero, a prominent aerospace engine aftermarket services provider, has established a long-term deal with Rolls-Royce to offer specific repair and overhaul assistance for the MT7 marine gas turbine engine at their Maryville, TN site. This engine propels the U.S. Navy's Ship to Shore Connector (SSC) vehicle. The agreement signifies a significant development in the aerospace industry as it solidifies support for a critical component of the Navy's fleet. This partnership underlines StandardAero's expertise in engine maintenance, repair, and overhaul services.

data.title: Sandhills Medical Appoints Amanda Duke as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In McBee, South Carolina, Sandhills Medical, a renowned Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC), has appointed Amanda Duke as Chief Executive Officer. With over 30 years in healthcare leadership, Duke, a former registered nurse, aims to enhance community access to quality healthcare. The South Carolina native is dedicated to implementing initiatives that will improve and broaden access to comprehensive and affordable healthcare services. Sandhills Medical is celebrated for its commitment to quality care and serves a significant number of patients in the region.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises On Trump Ceasefire; Tesla Earnings Due (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today's stock market saw a rise in the Dow Jones index following President Trump's extension of the U.S.-Iran ceasefire. Investor focus also turns to Tesla as their earnings report is scheduled to be released late in the day. The Dow Jones index increased by [number] points in response to the news, showing a positive trend in the market.
